mapper.select: SELECT name, headline, github, email, summary, skills::text AS skills, experience::text AS experience, projects::text AS projects, profile_image AS profileImage FROM about WHERE id = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO about (id, name, headline, github, email, summary, skills, experience, projects, profile_image, updated_at) VALUES (1, #{name}, #{headline}, #{github}, #{email}, #{summary}, #{skills}::jsonb, #{experience}::jsonb, #{projects}::jsonb, #{profileImage}, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, headline = EXCLUDED.headline, github = EXCLUDED.github, email = EXCLUDED.email, summary = EXCLUDED.summary, skills = EXCLUDED.skills, experience = EXCLUDED.experience, projects = EXCLUDED.projects, profile_image = EXCLUDED.profile_image, updated_at = NOW()
